figures.caption: Table 5: Coverage mapping of Agents of Chaos failure cases against the B̂(x) components that the RiskGate architecture engages for each.
Table 1: Operational interpretation of the viability index as Φ̂(x).
Table 2: Constructive mapping from B̂(x) terms to RiskGate estimators.

Figure 1: Viability trajectory under the emergent-bias scenario of §11.2. dC1 and dC3 remain flat while dC2 decays linearly, dragging V I(t) down. The orange band [0, 0.05] marks the BOUNDARY region; the red band dC2 < 0 marks the EXTERIOR. The Autopilot’s disparity-target intervention at op 300 acts 157 operations before BOUNDARY entry (op 457) and 108 operations before the reactive z-test would have fired (op 408). The aggregate t∗ = 1219 ops (eq. 48) predicts V I → 0 at op ≈ 1519 — a distant horizon buffered by healthy C1 and C3.
